name: stakeholder-sim
description: Stakeholder reaction simulation for PR and marketing. Industry-agnostic — researches the sender, maps stakeholders, and builds a persona cast per run (or loads a preset library). Spawns persona subagents in parallel, critic-passes each reaction, synthesizes consensus/disagreement/surprise signals, verifies every quote, and renders executive-grade deliverables: markdown report, crisis-PR-agency PDF, and McKinsey-style PowerPoint board deck. Fully agentic pipeline. Ships with an Aker BioMarine sample preset.
